description: Wide (1200x675) banner. The background is a deep blue gradient with faint diagonal brush streaks and translucent circular bubble shapes. On the left, a photograph of a young girl in a gray hoodie sits cross-legged, head down, lit by the glow of a black tablet she is holding. Near her are two small chat-icon graphics: an orange speech bubble with a white heart and a magenta speech bubble with a smiley face. On the right side are the white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal and the large white 'know2protect' logo (a speech bubble with three dots), with a trademark symbol and the tagline 'Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation'. Below that, white text reads 'To learn more, go to know2protect.gov'. The image combines photography with flat graphic overlays.
notable_text: know2protect - Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation; To learn more, go to know2protect.gov
